name: Twilight Ninja Kagen
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たそ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>昏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がれ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－カゲン
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Ninja" monsters. This effect cannot be negated. Once per turn, when your "Ninja" monster declares an attack: You can make that monster gain 1000 ATK until the end of the Damage Step (even if this card leaves the field).

[ Monster Effect ] 
You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Ninja" monster you control; it gains 800 ATK until the end of this turn.
pend_eff: You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Ninja" monsters. This effect cannot be negated. Once per turn, when your "Ninja" monster declares an attack: You can make that monster gain 1000 ATK until the end of the Damage Step (even if this card leaves the field).
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Ninja" monster you control; it gains 800 ATK until the end of this turn.
eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Ninja" monster you control; it gains 800 ATK until the end of this turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
